home.title: Sojori — The Short-Term Rental Orchestrator
home.description: Orchestration software for short-term rental managers. Reservation, guest, staff, owner — coordinated by AI, controlled from WhatsApp. Launching in Morocco.

pricing.title: Sojori Pricing — Short-Term Rental PMS | Marrakech, Casablanca, Paris
pricing.description: Transparent per-listing pricing. Solo to start. Orchestre to orchestrate. Symphonie to scale.

hero.title: Three tiers.
hero.subtitle: Solo to start. Orchestre to orchestrate. Symphonie to scale. No absurd tiers — one price per listing, per month.

solo.name: Solo
solo.description: The PMS that digitizes your business, without the orchestration layer.

orchestre.name: Orchestre
orchestre.description: The tier where AI takes over operations. WhatsApp + Web Direct Booking + Dynamic Pricing.

symphonie.name: Symphonie
symphonie.description: The complete Sojori. The 4th surface WhatsApp + TeamFlow Advanced + multi-brand + API.

onboarding.title: €300 one-time onboarding
onboarding.description: on all tiers · migration from your current tool + WhatsApp setup + 2h Zoom training.

engagement.a: Monthly: no commitment, cancel anytime. Annual: 12 months in exchange for −20%.

onboarding.a: Migration from your current tool (Hostfully, Smoobu, Lodgify, Hostaway), Channel Manager + WhatsApp Cloud API setup, workflow configuration, 2h Zoom training. Allow 5-7 business days. Everything is remote — no on-site, which allows us to stay fast and accessible. Guarantee: if onboarding is not completed within 14 days, you are fully refunded.

whatsappCost.a: On Solo, the 3 essential transactional templates are included. On Orchestre and Symphonie, conversational AI is unlimited and included — WhatsApp Cloud API costs are covered within standard usage. The vast majority of Sojori conversations are free thanks to WhatsApp's 24h service window.

webVsWhatsappBooking.q: What's the difference between Web Direct Booking and WhatsApp Booking Direct?
webVsWhatsappBooking.a: Web Direct Booking (Orchestre+) is either a complete booking website or an embeddable widget on your existing site (like Stripe checkout). WhatsApp Booking Direct (Symphonie) allows prospects to book directly in the WhatsApp chat, without going through a website. For WhatsApp Direct payments: either Sojori collects with a 5% markup, or the PM collects directly and Sojori takes 0%. Both eliminate OTA commission — but via two different channels.

changeTier.q: Can I change tiers during the year?
changeTier.a: Yes. Upgrade anytime (prorated). Downgrade at the end of the billing cycle.

freeTrial.a: 1 month free on any tier, no credit card required. The €300 onboarding is only charged upon signing, not during the trial.

finalCTA.title: Ready to orchestrate?
finalCTA.subtitle: Migration from your current tool included in onboarding. No credit card required for trial. Setup in less than 7 days.

hero.title: Short-term rental
hero.subtitle: Sojori coordinates your short-term rental business like a human would — reservation, guest, staff, owner. Except it never sleeps.
hero.subtitleStrong: And it doesn't ask you to drive.
hero.flow: RESERVATION → GUEST → STAFF → OWNER · ONE SINGLE THREAD

admin.dashboard:
Hello Marc 👋

*🎯 Dashboard*

Type the corresponding letter:

*T* - Pending tasks (3)

*M* - Guest messages (7)
*V* - Reviews to respond (2)

cases.title: Autonomous check-in D-7 → D+1

steps: AI detects language + category (WiFi, AC, code...)

steps: Staff receives WhatsApp notif with details
GPS to property · link shared in WhatsApp

fullCycle.title: Airbnb → Sojori → WhatsApp + AI →
fullCycle.subtitle: The message arrives from Airbnb or Booking.com, goes through AI WhatsApp with translation, PM validation, then returns automatically to the original platform. The entire cycle in seconds.

autopilot.title: Mode
autopilot.description: For simple questions (WiFi, codes, schedules...), activate autopilot mode. AI responds directly without validation. You supervise in the background and intervene if necessary.

finalCTA.title: Activate WhatsApp.
finalCTA.subtitle: 4 WhatsApp systems included from the Pro plan. 5-minute setup. Unlimited technical support.

hero.title: Sojori integrates
hero.subtitle: Native integrations (Rentals United, Channex, Minut, Chekin, Hostaway, etc.). Everything else: REST API, webhooks, or no-code tools via HTTP. No vendor lock-in.

apiSection.label: ● API & Webhooks
apiSection.title: Not on the list?
apiSection.description: REST API and webhooks (business events) according to your contract; authentication via keys/tokens. No-code automation possible via HTTP (Zapier, Make, etc.).

hero.description: Property managers deserve better than tools that only manage calendars and payments. Sojori addresses the need for
hero.descriptionEnd: : coordinating every interaction, anticipating every need, at the right time.

mission.title: Orchestrate every detail of the
mission.subtitle: Like the best concierge would.
mission.goalTitle: Not just managing bookings. But coordinating every interaction, anticipating every need, orchestrating every moment — with the precision of a 5-star concierge.

ch1.title: The gap between ambition and tools.
ch1.p1End: : hospitality, attention to detail, anticipating needs.
ch1.p2: But traditional PMS systems are limited to managing

ch2.title: The need for orchestration, not automation.
ch2.p1: Traditional PMS manage calendars, bookings, payments — but they
ch2.p2: The market needs an orchestrator: a platform that knows a welcome message must be sent D-7, a door code must be generated 4 hours before check-in, that cleaning must be verified before 2 PM.

ch3.title: PMS automate. Sojori
ch3.p1: It's the difference between a robot following rules and a
ch3.p1End: coordinating each instrument at the right time.
ch3.commitment: you never have to chase a check-in, cleaning, or unsent message again. We orchestrate — you welcome.

values.title: What
values.subtitle: Four principles we revisit with each feature, each hire, each product decision.

value1.title: Hosts
value1.description: We build for those who wake up at 6 AM to manage a check-in. Not for VC slides.

value2.title: Orchestration, not
value2.description: Traditional PMS automate. We orchestrate. Every task, at the right time, to the right person.

value3.title: Local
value3.description: Offices in Paris & Casablanca. Clients in France, Spain, Portugal, Morocco. Sojori adapts to the rules, languages, and customs of each market.

value4.title: Ship fast,
value4.description: The market moves fast. We ship every week, we listen, we improve. Every host feedback becomes a feature, not a Jira ticket.

timeline.title: From a vision to
timeline.subtitle: Founded in 2024, launched in 2025, expanding multi-country.

2024.label: Foundation
2024.description: Sojori is founded to address the orchestration need in short-term rental management. The goal: go beyond traditional PMS by coordinating every step of the guest journey.

2025.label: Launch
2025.description: Sojori is launched. First property managers adopt the platform to orchestrate their daily operations.

today.label: Expansion
today.description: Clients across different countries use Sojori. We continue improving the product with their feedback — week after week.

founder.bioEnd: . Leads the development of the Sojori orchestration platform.
